    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
WHERE dc.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
ORDER BY ds.STATE_NAME ASC, dd.DISTRICT_NAME ASC;

    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID

उन उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों की पहचान करें जहां वर्ष 2021 के दौरान 500 से अधिक महिलाओं ने अपनी पहली तिमाही के भीतर प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल के लिए पंजीकरण कराया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) > 500
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    sd.TYPE_OF_AREA
FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd
JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION anc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = anc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON anc.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND anc.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER > 500;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT
    sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,

JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND anc.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER > 500;

question: वर्ष 2021 के लिए, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार एक विवरण प्रदान करें जो हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से कम वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या और किए गए हीमोग्लोबिन परीक्षणों की औसत संख्या दर्शाता हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T1.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T1.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T2.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql: SELECT sd.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS TOTAL_PREGNANT_WOMEN_HB_LESS_THAN_11, AVG(mht.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS AVG_HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON mht.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021 GROUP BY sd.TYPE_OF_AREA;
raw_output: SELECT sd.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS TOTAL_PREGNANT_WOMEN_HB_LESS_THAN_11, AVG(mht.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS AVG_HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON mht.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021 GROUP BY sd.TYPE_OF_AREA;

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उन उप-जिलों की पहचान करें जिन्होंने 2021 में या तो 10 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र के 34 से अधिक बच्चों को उनका TT10/TD10 टीकाकरण प्राप्त करते हुए सूचित किया, या वे शहरी क्षेत्र हैं जहाँ 16 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र के एक से अधिक बच्चे ने अपना TT16/TD16 खुराक प्राप्त किया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE (T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 34.0) OR (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16 > 1.0) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd
JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT a ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = a.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON a.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND (
    a.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 34
    OR 
    (sd.TYPE_OF_AREA ILIKE 'Urban' AND a.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16 > 1)
);
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd
JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT a ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = a.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON a.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND (
    a.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 34
    OR 
    (sd.TYPE_OF_AREA ILIKE 'Urban' AND a.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16 > 1)
);

SELECT 
    sd.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(mar.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) AS TOTAL_PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED,
